text: Which AI/ML model type best fits this use case (LLM, vision model, classification, regression, hybrid)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend model types based on input/output requirements and task complexity.

text: What is the recommended model size and parameter count for this use case?
aiAgentGuidance: Analyze task complexity and latency requirements to recommend model size.

text: Should we use a foundation model, fine-tuned model, or custom-trained model?
aiAgentGuidance: Evaluate data availability, domain specificity, and cost to recommend approach.

text: Which specific model providers/versions are being evaluated (GPT-4, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Mistral)?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare models against requirements using benchmark data and pricing.

text: What context window size is required for this use case?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate from document sizes, conversation length, and structured data needs.

text: What inference latency targets must be met (p50, p95, p99)?
aiAgentGuidance: Set targets based on user-facing vs. batch processing requirements.

text: What throughput capacity is needed (tokens/sec, requests/min)?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate from expected user load and concurrent request patterns.

text: What is the model's expected accuracy/quality for this domain?
aiAgentGuidance: Research benchmark scores for candidate models on similar tasks.

text: What model versioning and update strategy will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend versioning approach based on deployment type and risk tolerance.

text: How will model performance be monitored and evaluated in production?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate monitoring plan with key metrics, dashboards, and alert thresholds.

text: What is the plan for handling model deprecation or provider changes?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft migration strategy and abstraction layer recommendations.

text: What model serving infrastructure is required (API gateway, load balancer, cache)?
aiAgentGuidance: Design serving architecture based on latency, throughput, and availability needs.

text: Is the required AI capability available as a commercial API or product?
aiAgentGuidance: Research available commercial solutions and compare features.

text: What are the total cost implications of build vs. buy over 3 years?
aiAgentGuidance: Model TCO for build and buy scenarios including development, maintenance, and scaling costs.

text: What is the vendor lock-in risk for buy options?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess lock-in using portability, data ownership, and contract terms analysis.

text: What is the team's capability to build and maintain a custom solution?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human assessment of team skills and available resources.

text: What are the customization requirements that commercial solutions may not meet?
aiAgentGuidance: Gap analysis between commercial product features and specific requirements.

text: What support and SLA guarantees come with commercial solutions?
aiAgentGuidance: Research vendor SLA tiers and support options for shortlisted products.

text: How well do commercial solutions integrate with existing infrastructure?
aiAgentGuidance: Evaluate integration compatibility against current tech stack.

text: What data residency and processing requirements constrain the buy decision?
aiAgentGuidance: Check vendor data processing locations against regulatory requirements.

text: What accuracy metrics and benchmarking standards apply to this AI system?
aiAgentGuidance: Select metrics appropriate for the task type and output format.

text: What is the minimum acceptable accuracy threshold for production deployment?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human judgment on acceptable quality vs. automation trade-offs.

text: How will edge cases and failure modes be identified and handled?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose edge case testing strategy based on domain and input variability.

text: What is the expected model degradation rate over time and how will drift be detected?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up drift detection metrics and alerting thresholds.

text: How will the system handle out-of-distribution inputs?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend OOD detection methods and graceful degradation strategies.

text: What quality assurance process will be used for AI outputs?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose QA workflow with sampling rates, review criteria, and escalation paths.

text: What benchmarking methodology will be used for model comparison?
aiAgentGuidance: Design benchmark suite with representative test cases and scoring rubrics.

text: How will model performance across different demographic groups be evaluated?
aiAgentGuidance: Define fairness metrics and demographic slicing strategy for evaluation.

text: What is the strategy for continuous improvement of model quality?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose feedback loop architecture for model improvement.

text: How will production inference quality be validated against test performance?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up A/B testing framework and statistical significance testing.

text: Is a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) architecture needed for this use case?
aiAgentGuidance: Evaluate need based on domain specificity, data freshness, and accuracy requirements.

text: What vector database technology will be used (Pinecone, Weaviate, ChromaDB, pgvector)?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare vector DBs on cost, scalability, and integration with existing stack.

text: What embedding model and dimensions will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend embedding model based on language, domain, and performance benchmarks.

text: What chunking strategy is optimal for the source data (fixed, semantic, recursive)?
aiAgentGuidance: Analyze document types and recommend chunking approach with overlap settings.

text: What retrieval strategy will be used (dense, sparse, hybrid, reranking)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend retrieval strategy based on query types and accuracy requirements.

text: How frequently does the knowledge base need to be updated?
aiAgentGuidance: Determine update frequency from data freshness requirements and source change rates.

text: What is the expected knowledge base size (documents, tokens, vectors)?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate from source document inventory and growth projections.

text: How will retrieval relevance and quality be measured?
aiAgentGuidance: Define retrieval metrics (MRR, NDCG, recall@k) and evaluation methodology.

text: What metadata filtering and hybrid search capabilities are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Design metadata schema and filter strategies based on query patterns.

text: How will the system handle multi-document reasoning and synthesis?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose multi-hop reasoning architecture if cross-document queries are needed.

text: What citation and source attribution approach will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Implement citation tracking from retrieval metadata to generated output.

text: How will conflicting information across sources be handled?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose conflict resolution strategy (recency, authority ranking, highlighting conflicts).

text: What document processing pipeline is needed (OCR, parsing, cleaning, enrichment)?
aiAgentGuidance: Design document processing pipeline based on source formats and quality.

text: What agent orchestration framework will be used (LangGraph, AutoGen, CrewAI, custom)?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare frameworks on maturity, features, and alignment with requirements.

text: What are the agent roles, planning strategies, and task decomposition approaches?
aiAgentGuidance: Decompose the task into agent roles based on functional requirements.

text: What communication protocol will agents use (message passing, shared state, event bus)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend inter-agent communication based on coordination needs and latency.

text: What memory architecture will agents use (short-term, long-term, episodic, semantic)?
aiAgentGuidance: Design memory architecture based on context persistence and session requirements.

text: How will agent planning and task decomposition work?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose planning strategy (ReAct, plan-and-solve, tree-of-thoughts) based on task complexity.

text: What tool use and function calling capabilities are required?
aiAgentGuidance: Inventory required tools and design function calling schema.

text: How will agent execution be sandboxed for safety?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose sandboxing strategy (containerization, permission scoping, output validation).

text: What observability and debugging capabilities are needed for agent workflows?
aiAgentGuidance: Design tracing and logging infrastructure for multi-step agent execution.

text: What failure handling and cost/budget control mechanisms exist for agent operations?
aiAgentGuidance: Implement circuit breakers, step limits, and loop detection mechanisms.

text: What is the agent's maximum execution budget (time, tokens, API calls)?
aiAgentGuidance: Set budgets based on task complexity and cost constraints.

text: What deployment model will be used (cloud API, self-hosted, edge, hybrid)?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend deployment model based on latency, security, and cost requirements.

text: What cloud provider(s) will host the AI infrastructure?
aiAgentGuidance: Evaluate cloud providers on AI service availability, pricing, and compliance.

text: What GPU/TPU compute requirements exist for inference?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate compute needs from model size, batch size, and throughput requirements.

text: What containerization and orchestration platform will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend based on existing platform (Kubernetes, Cloud Run, ECS) and scaling needs.

text: What CI/CD pipeline changes are needed for ML/AI deployments?
aiAgentGuidance: Design MLOps pipeline with model testing, validation, and rollback capabilities.

text: What caching strategy will be used for model responses?
aiAgentGuidance: Design semantic caching approach based on query similarity and freshness needs.

text: What API rate limiting and throttling strategy is needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Set rate limits based on cost constraints and fair usage policies.

text: What blue-green or canary deployment strategy will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Design deployment strategy based on risk tolerance and rollback requirements.

text: How will model artifacts be versioned and stored?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend model registry and artifact management approach.

text: What auto-scaling policies will be configured?
aiAgentGuidance: Define scaling triggers based on latency, queue depth, and resource utilization.

text: What data encryption requirements exist (at rest, in transit, in processing)?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply encryption standards based on data classification and regulatory requirements.

text: What prompt injection prevention and data leakage protection measures are in place?
aiAgentGuidance: Implement input validation, output filtering, and prompt injection detection.

text: How will data leakage through model outputs be prevented?
aiAgentGuidance: Design output filtering and PII detection mechanisms.

text: What access control model will govern AI system usage (RBAC, ABAC)?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply organization's standard access control patterns.

text: How will API keys and model credentials be managed?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply secrets management best practices (vault, rotation, scoping).

text: What network security requirements exist (VPC, private endpoints, IP restrictions)?
aiAgentGuidance: Design network topology based on data sensitivity and compliance requirements.

text: How will model supply chain security be ensured?
aiAgentGuidance: Assess model provenance, licensing, and integrity verification.

text: What adversarial robustness testing will be performed?
aiAgentGuidance: Design red team testing plan based on threat model and attack surfaces.

text: How will the system handle PII and sensitive data in prompts and responses?
aiAgentGuidance: Design PII detection, masking, and handling pipeline.

text: What security incident response plan exists for AI-specific threats?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft incident response playbook for AI-specific attack scenarios.

text: What API design patterns will be used for AI service endpoints?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply REST/GraphQL standards with AI-specific considerations (streaming, async).

text: How will the AI system integrate with existing data pipelines?
aiAgentGuidance: Map data flow from source systems through AI processing to downstream consumers.

text: What message queue or event streaming platform will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Select platform based on throughput, ordering, and durability requirements.

text: How will webhook or callback patterns be implemented for async AI processing?
aiAgentGuidance: Design async notification pattern with retry and dead-letter handling.

text: What SDK or client library support is needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Identify languages and platforms that need SDK support.

text: How will backward compatibility be maintained during AI model updates?
aiAgentGuidance: Design API versioning strategy and migration path for model updates.

text: What data transformation and normalization is needed between systems?
aiAgentGuidance: Map data formats between source and AI system requirements.

text: What prompt templates and structures will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Design prompt templates based on task type and quality requirements.

text: How will system prompts be versioned and managed?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend prompt management infrastructure and versioning approach.

text: What few-shot examples or demonstrations are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Curate representative examples from domain expertise and test data.

text: How will prompt effectiveness be measured and optimized?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up A/B testing framework for prompt variants with quality metrics.

text: What output formatting and structure instructions are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Define output schemas and parsing logic for structured AI responses.

text: How will dynamic prompt construction handle variable inputs?
aiAgentGuidance: Design prompt template system with variable interpolation and context assembly.

text: What guardrails are embedded in the prompt design?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose system prompt guardrails based on safety requirements.

text: How will prompt length be managed relative to context window limits?
aiAgentGuidance: Implement token counting and truncation strategies.

text: What MLOps platform will be used for model lifecycle management?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare MLOps platforms (MLflow, Weights & Biases, SageMaker) against requirements.

text: What model performance metrics will be tracked in production?
aiAgentGuidance: Define key metrics dashboard (latency, accuracy, token usage, error rates).

text: How will data drift and concept drift be detected?
aiAgentGuidance: Implement drift detection using statistical tests and reference distributions.

text: What alerting thresholds will trigger model retraining or replacement?
aiAgentGuidance: Set alert thresholds based on acceptable degradation ranges.

text: How will A/B testing be implemented for model variants?
aiAgentGuidance: Design experiment framework with traffic splitting and statistical significance.

text: What model explainability tools will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend explainability methods based on model type and stakeholder needs.

text: How will feedback loops from users improve model performance?
aiAgentGuidance: Design RLHF or feedback collection pipeline for continuous improvement.

text: What model governance and approval workflow is needed for deployments?
aiAgentGuidance: Define deployment approval gates with automated quality checks.

text: What peak load capacity and load testing strategies are planned?
aiAgentGuidance: Model peak load from business patterns and design capacity planning.

text: How will the system handle request queuing during high load?
aiAgentGuidance: Design queue management with priority levels and backpressure mechanisms.

text: What load testing strategy will validate performance under stress?
aiAgentGuidance: Create load test plan with realistic scenarios and success criteria.

text: How will geographic distribution of inference be handled?
aiAgentGuidance: Design multi-region deployment strategy based on user locations and latency needs.

text: What batching strategies will optimize throughput?
aiAgentGuidance: Design batch processing logic for non-real-time workloads.

text: How will token usage be optimized to reduce costs and latency?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose token optimization strategies (caching, compression, prompt pruning).

text: What connection pooling and resource management strategies are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Design connection management based on concurrency patterns.

text: How will the system handle graceful degradation under load?
aiAgentGuidance: Design degradation tiers (reduced quality, increased latency, partial functionality).

text: What test data requirements exist, including strategies for nondeterministic output validation?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose synthetic data generation and augmentation approaches.

text: How will adversarial inputs be tested against the system?
aiAgentGuidance: Design adversarial test suite based on OWASP LLM Top 10.

text: What end-to-end testing framework will be used for AI workflows?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend testing framework compatible with async AI processing.

text: How will non-deterministic AI outputs be validated in automated tests?
aiAgentGuidance: Design fuzzy matching and semantic similarity validation approaches.

text: What integration testing strategy covers AI-to-system boundaries?
aiAgentGuidance: Map integration points and design contract tests.

text: How will prompt regression testing be automated?
aiAgentGuidance: Set up prompt evaluation pipeline with golden test cases.

text: What chaos engineering practices will test AI system resilience?
aiAgentGuidance: Design chaos tests for API failures, latency spikes, and model degradation.

text: How will model safety testing (jailbreaking, harmful content) be conducted?
aiAgentGuidance: Create safety test suite with known attack patterns and harmful content categories.

text: What is the maintenance strategy including technical debt management?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate maintenance effort from component complexity and update frequency.

text: How will AI-specific technical debt be tracked and managed?
aiAgentGuidance: Define tech debt categories (model staleness, prompt drift, data pipeline rot).

text: What documentation standards apply to AI system architecture?
aiAgentGuidance: Generate documentation templates for AI system components.

text: How will knowledge transfer be handled for AI system ownership?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft knowledge transfer plan with runbooks and operational procedures.

text: What on-call and incident management processes exist for AI systems?
aiAgentGuidance: Design on-call rotation and escalation procedures for AI-specific incidents.

text: What fine-tuning approach and training data requirements apply?
aiAgentGuidance: Evaluate need and recommend approach (LoRA, QLoRA, full fine-tuning, RLHF).

text: What training data volume and quality is needed for fine-tuning?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate data needs based on task complexity and performance targets.

text: What compute resources are needed for training/fine-tuning?
aiAgentGuidance: Calculate GPU/TPU requirements from model size and training data volume.

text: How will training data be curated, labeled, and validated?
aiAgentGuidance: Design data pipeline with quality gates and labeling workflow.

text: What evaluation methodology will validate fine-tuned model quality?
aiAgentGuidance: Design evaluation suite with held-out test sets and human evaluation.

text: How frequently will the model need retraining?
aiAgentGuidance: Estimate based on data freshness needs and drift detection thresholds.

text: What hyperparameter optimization strategy will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend HPO approach (grid search, Bayesian optimization, population-based).

text: How will catastrophic forgetting be prevented during fine-tuning?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply forgetting mitigation techniques based on fine-tuning approach.

text: What input modalities must the system handle (text, image, audio, video, document)?
aiAgentGuidance: Catalog required modalities from functional requirements.

text: What preprocessing pipeline is needed for each input modality?
aiAgentGuidance: Design preprocessing steps for each modality (OCR, ASR, image processing).

text: How will cross-modal reasoning be implemented?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose fusion architecture for combining information across modalities.

text: What output modalities are required (text, image, audio, structured data)?
aiAgentGuidance: Map output requirements to generation capabilities.

text: How will multimodal content safety be ensured?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply content moderation across all input and output modalities.

text: What evaluation framework will be used (LangSmith, RAGAS, custom)?
aiAgentGuidance: Compare evaluation frameworks on metrics coverage and integration ease.

text: What human evaluation protocol will supplement automated metrics?
aiAgentGuidance: Design human evaluation workflow with rubrics and inter-rater reliability.

text: How will evaluation results drive model selection and optimization?
aiAgentGuidance: Define decision criteria for model selection based on evaluation outcomes.

text: What regression testing suite will ensure quality across model updates?
aiAgentGuidance: Build regression suite from golden dataset and critical test cases.

text: How will evaluation metrics be reported to stakeholders?
aiAgentGuidance: Design evaluation dashboard and reporting cadence.

text: What input validation and sanitization is needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Define input validation rules based on expected input types and attack vectors.

text: What output filtering and content moderation will be applied?
aiAgentGuidance: Configure content safety filters based on use case audience and policies.

text: What constitutional AI or RLHF alignment techniques are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Evaluate alignment needs based on autonomy level and risk classification.

text: How will the system prevent harmful, biased, or inappropriate outputs?
aiAgentGuidance: Design multi-layer safety architecture (input, processing, output filters).

text: What kill switch or emergency stop mechanisms are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Design emergency shutdown procedures and manual override capabilities.

text: How will the system handle attempts to bypass safety measures?
aiAgentGuidance: Implement defense-in-depth with detection and escalation for bypass attempts.

text: What logging and alerting exists for safety-relevant events?
aiAgentGuidance: Design safety event logging and real-time alerting infrastructure.

text: How will organizational knowledge be structured for AI consumption?
aiAgentGuidance: Design knowledge graph or taxonomy for domain-specific information.

text: What knowledge update and curation process will maintain accuracy?
aiAgentGuidance: Design knowledge management workflow with review and approval processes.

text: How will conflicting or outdated knowledge be identified and resolved?
aiAgentGuidance: Implement version tracking and conflict detection for knowledge base entries.

text: What access controls apply to different knowledge domains?
aiAgentGuidance: Apply role-based access to knowledge base segments based on sensitivity.

text: How will the system handle knowledge gaps and unknown topics?
aiAgentGuidance: Design fallback behavior for queries outside knowledge boundaries.

text: How will conversation history and context be managed?
aiAgentGuidance: Design context window management strategy with summarization and sliding windows.

text: What session management approach will be used?
aiAgentGuidance: Design session state management based on interaction patterns.

text: How will the system handle multi-turn conversations?
aiAgentGuidance: Propose conversation flow management with context tracking.

text: What personalization capabilities are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Design user preference learning and adaptation mechanisms.

text: How will conversation state be persisted across sessions?
aiAgentGuidance: Design state persistence strategy (database, cache, vector store).

text: Are there requirements for edge deployment or on-device inference?
aiAgentGuidance: Evaluate edge deployment needs based on latency, privacy, and connectivity requirements.

text: What model compression techniques are needed for edge deployment?
aiAgentGuidance: Recommend compression (quantization, distillation, pruning) based on target hardware.

text: How will real-time streaming AI processing be implemented?
aiAgentGuidance: Design streaming architecture based on latency and throughput requirements.

text: What offline/disconnected mode capabilities are needed?
aiAgentGuidance: Design offline capabilities with sync and conflict resolution.

text: How will edge and cloud inference be coordinated?
aiAgentGuidance: Design hybrid inference routing based on task complexity and connectivity.

text: What is the migration plan from current system to AI-powered solution?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft phased migration plan with parallel run and cutover strategy.

text: How will data migration and format conversion be handled?
aiAgentGuidance: Design data migration pipeline with validation and rollback capabilities.

text: What rollback plan exists if the AI system does not meet expectations?
aiAgentGuidance: Define rollback triggers, procedures, and acceptable risk thresholds.

text: How will parallel operations be managed during transition?
aiAgentGuidance: Design shadow mode and A/B comparison during migration period.

text: What training and change management is needed for technical teams?
aiAgentGuidance: Draft technical training plan for DevOps, engineering, and support teams.

text: How will existing integrations be preserved or migrated?
aiAgentGuidance: Map existing integrations and design migration path for each.

text: What is the timeline for decommissioning legacy systems?
aiAgentGuidance: Requires human judgment on business continuity and dependency analysis.

text: How will historical data from legacy systems be made available to the AI system?
aiAgentGuidance: Design historical data ingestion and indexing strategy.
